solutions.solution:
(d) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet.

As, F I C K → 15 17 8 10 2 4 10 12
                O G H J B D J L

Similarly, F L A T → 8 7 14 13 26 2 19 21
                     E G K M Z B S U

∴ FLAT ⇒ EGKMZBSU

(d) Starting from right end, each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet.

As, C H A T → 3 8 1 20 → 19 21 26 2 7 9 2 4
                        S U Z B G I B D

Similarly, A P T → 1 16 20 → 19 21 15 17 26 2
                             S U O Q Z B

∴ APT ⇒ SUOQZB

(c) Starting from right end, each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet.

As, P I N K Y → 16 9 14 11 25 → 24 26 10 12 13 15 8 10 15 17
                                  X Z J L M O H J O Q

Similarly, V A N D Y → 22 1 4 14 25 → 24 26 3 5 13 15 26 2 21 23
                                       X Z C E M O Z B U W

∴ VANDY ⇒ XZCEMOZUW

(c) Each letter is coded with its right and left letters respectively in English alphabet.

As, T R U E → 20 18 21 5 → 21 19 19 17 22 20 6 4
                            U S S Q V T F D

Similarly, P R A Y → 16 18 1 25 → 17 15 19 17 2 26 26 24
                                   Q O S Q B Z Z X

∴ PRAY ⇒ QOSQBZZX
